title: Peek Settings
description: User settings for the Peek database GUI.

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON Schema file. Lets editors provide autocomplete and validation.

name.description: Display name used in multiplayer sessions. Defaults to the system $USER.

ai.description: Local AI model configuration. Peek talks to an Ollama-compatible endpoint.

model.description: Model identifier passed to the AI endpoint.

url.description: Base URL of the Ollama-compatible AI server.

workspaces.description: Workspaces shown in the connection picker. Each groups one or more database connections.

name.description: Workspace name shown in the UI.

connections.description: Database connections belonging to this workspace.

name.description: Connection name shown in the UI.

color.description: Accent color (CSS color string) used to mark this connection in the UI.

url.description: Database connection URL, e.g. postgres://user:pass@host:5432/dbname or mysql://...

ssh_tunnel.description: Optional SSH tunnel used to reach the database through a bastion host.

ssh_user.description: SSH username on the bastion host.

key_path.description: Absolute path to the SSH private key file (e.g. a .pem).

ssh_port.description: SSH port on the bastion host.

local_port.description: Local port the tunnel binds to. Set to 0 to let the OS pick a free port.
